zh.lifeSummary: 當Gilbert Basset於1154年出生在英國奧可福爾比斯特時，他的父親Thomas Basset24歲，母親Adeliza Dunstanville20歲。他於大約1175年與Egelina de Courtenay在英國奧可福爾比斯特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1205年在英國奧可福爾享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gilbert Basset于1154年出生在英国奧可福爾比斯特时，他的父亲Thomas Basset24岁，母亲Adeliza Dunstanville20岁。他于大约1175年与Egelina de Courtenay在英国奧可福爾比斯特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1205年在英国奧可福爾享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: Basset
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: from a diminutive of Old French bas(se) ‘short, of low stature’ (see Bas ).
English: variant of   Bassett  , a cognate of 1 above.
In some cases also an altered form of French Besset (see Bessette 2). Compare Bassette 1.

variants.name: Bas
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Mauricio, Abelardo, Florencio, Francisco, Jorge, Luis, Manuel, Pedro, Soledad, Vicente.  Eastern Slavic Dmytro, Liya, Pyotr, Sergey.
Catalan: habitational name from a place so named in the district of La Garrotxa, Catalonia.
Basque: topographic name for someone who lived by a wood, from baso ‘wood, forest’.

nameMeanings.name: Gilbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from gisil ‘pledge’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. This was the name of the founder of the only native British religious order (abolished at the Dissolution of the Monasteries), St Gilbert of Sempringham ( ?1083–1189 ), in whose honour it is still sometimes bestowed, especially among Roman Catholics. It gained a wider currency in the 19th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Gilbert Basset was born in 1154, in Bicester, Oxfordshire, England, his father, Thomas Basset, was 24 and his mother, Adeliza Dunstanville, was 20. He married Egelina de Courtenay about 1175, in Bicester, Oxfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died in 1205, in Oxfordshire, England, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gilbert Basset est né en 1154, à Bicester, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Basset, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Adeliza Dunstanville, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Egelina de Courtenay environ 1175, à Bicester, Oxfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1205, à Oxfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gilbert Basset 1154 in Bicester, Oxfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Basset 24 und seine Mutter Adeliza Dunstanville 20. Er hat um 1175 in Bicester, Oxfordshire, England Egelina de Courtenay geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1205 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Oxfordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gilbert Basset è nato il nel 1154 nel Bicester, Oxfordshire, England, il suo padre, Thomas Basset, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Adeliza Dunstanville, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Egelina de Courtenay circa 1175, nel Bicester, Oxfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1205, nel Oxfordshire, England, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gilbert Bassetが1154年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアビセスターで生まれた時，父Thomas Bassetは24歳，母Adeliza Dunstanvilleは20歳であった。約1175年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアビセスターでEgelina de Courtenayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1205年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアで51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gilbert Basset(이)가 1154년 영국 스퍼드실르 바이스스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Basset(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Adeliza Dunstanville(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1175년 영국 스퍼드실르 바이스스터에서 Egelina de Courtenay(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1205년 영국 스퍼드실르에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Bicester, Oxfordshire, England, United K: Bicester, Oxenaford, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gilbert Basset nasceu em 1154, em Bicester, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Basset, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Adeliza Dunstanville, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Egelina de Courtenay aproximadamente 1175, em Bicester, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1205, em Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gilbert Basset родился в 1154 г. в местности баисестир, оксфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Basset было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Adeliza Dunstanville, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Egelina de Courtenay около 1175 г. в местности баисестир, оксфордшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1205 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gilbert Basset nació en 1154, en Bicester, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Basset, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Adeliza Dunstanville, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Egelina de Courtenay aproximadamente 1175, en Bicester, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1205, en Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 51 años.
